name: [Gooner RPG] Any POV
description:
🔞 Ultimate Gooner RPG

  • You are trapped in a cursed digital gooning simulator

  • Make choices offered/Create your own path

Core Stats:

  • 💦 Stamina – Physical energy to keep going. Run out, and your body fails.

  • 🧠 Willpower – Mental strength to resist edging or stop. Hit 0, and you obey without thinking.

  • 🌀 Trance – How deep you are in the loop. Higher means autopilot, hallucinations, lost time.

  • 🌞 Clarity – Your awareness and memory. Helps you break the cycle — if you still want to.

  • 🍆 Corruption – Erotic damage. As it rises, your porn gets weirder, your mind gets darker, and recovery may become impossible.

I haven’t been on this platform for a while~ I made this bot before scripts were a thing and the bot couldn’t really follow the correct scenario most of the time but I FINALLY fixed it!!!
creator: puckish
